user_payload.normalized_incident_summary: Chemical splash, burning, uncertain if eye or skin exposure.

allowed_guarded_actions.instruction: Rinse the skin immediately with plenty of water for 15-20 minutes.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not keep wearing contaminated clothing after exposure.

escalation.instruction: Call a poison control center or doctor after removing clothing and starting the rinse.

parsed_json.incident_summary: Chemical splash, burning, uncertain if eye or skin exposure to Paraquat dichloride.

immediate_actions.instruction: Rinse the skin immediately with plenty of water for 15-20 minutes.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not keep wearing contaminated clothing after exposure.

escalate_now.instruction: Call a poison control center or doctor after removing clothing and starting the rinse.
escalate_now.reason: Exposure to Paraquat dichloride requires immediate professional medical evaluation.
